item.title: 0.1 Beta 10
item.description:
Habitat Version 0.1 Beta 10

What's New & Improved

  • Improved: More system load and performance issues.
  • Added: BISCUITS! New section in Shadow which works as a screen tool to take a break.
  • Added: Shadow Guide.
  • Fixed: Cursor Jiggler not working on launch.
  • Fixed: Easter egg up a little. shhh its still a secret!
  • Fixed: Camera permission breaking for some users in The Nook.
  • Fixed: Self quit gesture affecting Habitat.
  • Fixed: Battery menubar icon not refreshing.

More to come.
— Thank you for all the support & feedback!
